query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone'; SELECT id, contract_no, paid_at, total_amount, period, is_bad_debt_row, overpaid, principal, interest, fee FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone' LIMIT 3; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contracts WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND commission_net IS NOT NULL AND commission_net > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone'; SELECT id, contract_no, paid_at, total_amount, period, is_bad_debt_row, overpaid, principal, interest, fee FROM debt_collected_cache WHERE section = 'Boonphone' LIMIT 3; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contracts WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND commission_net IS NOT NULL AND commission_net > 0;
